languages.text: Мехадендрит вопиет о техноереси. Вся его конструкция — грех изобретательства и надругательство над священными схемами Марса.

traits.locale_text: Механодендрит вопиет о техноереси. Вся его конструкция — грех изобретательства и надругательство над священными схемами Марса.

languages.text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.
languages.original_text: Мехадендрит вопиет о техноереси. Вся его конструкция — грех изобретательства и надругательство над священными схемами Марса.

traits.locale_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.
The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.
The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

languages.text: Der Mechadendrit ist eindeutig Tech-Ketzerei. Sein Design ist ein Verbrechen der Innovation und eine Schmähung der heiligen Pläne des Mars.
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: Der Mechadendrit ist eindeutig Tech-Ketzerei. Sein Design ist ein Verbrechen der Innovation und eine Schmähung der heiligen Pläne des Mars.

languages.text: 这根机械触须充满了技术异端的气息。它的整个设计就是罪恶的创新，是对火星神圣蓝图的亵渎。
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: 这根机械触须充满了技术异端的气息。它的整个设计就是罪恶的创新，是对火星神圣蓝图的亵渎。

languages.text: Cette mécadendrite est criante de technohérésie. Sa conception est un crime d'innovation et une profanation des plans sacrés de Mars.
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: Cette mécadendrite est criante de technohérésie. Sa conception est un crime d'innovation et une profanation des plans sacrés de Mars.

languages.text: La mecadendrita es una obra manifiesta de tecnoherejía. La totalidad de su diseño incurre en el crimen de la innovación y constituye una profanación de los sagrados patrones de Marte.
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: La mecadendrita es una obra manifiesta de tecnoherejía. La totalidad de su diseño incurre en el crimen de la innovación y constituye una profanación de los sagrados patrones de Marte.

languages.text: Mekadentrit, tekno kâfirlik diye bağırıyor. Tüm tasarımı, yenilik suçunun bir ürünü ve Mars'ın kutsal şemalarına saygısızlık içeriyor.
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: Mekadentrit, tekno kâfirlik diye bağırıyor. Tüm tasarımı, yenilik suçunun bir ürünü ve Mars'ın kutsal şemalarına saygısızlık içeriyor.

languages.text: メカデンドライトはテクノロジーの異端を叫ぶ。その設計全体は革新の罪であり、火星の神聖な設計図の汚染である。
languages.original_text: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.

traits.locale_text: メカデンドライトはテクノロジーの異端を叫ぶ。その設計全体は革新の罪であり、火星の神聖な設計図の汚染である。
